summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-circle community platform V1 hardening. All critical features working correctly including authentication, validation, admin functionality, and security measures.
passed_tests: Login with admin@circles.io / admin123 - session persistence verified
Registration with weak password correctly rejected with validation error
Registration with valid password (8+ chars, letter+digit) accepted
Site Manager: circle creation with slug validation working
Admin Members page: search, sort, and last-admin protection working
Admin Events page: filters, create event dialog, published toggle working
Password validation: both client-side and server-side working
Email validation: invalid formats correctly rejected
Login rate limiting: triggers after multiple failed attempts
CSRF protection: working correctly with proper token handling
Backend APIs: 100% success rate (34/34 tests passed)
Frontend navigation: login, dashboard, admin pages all working
Session management: proper authentication state handling
